crow_harness.activationMessage: The Crow Harness has been added to your tools! Now you must seek out a crow to bind to the harness.

cruel_mode.activationMessage: Cruel Mode activated! Start a new game to experience the ultimate challenge.
cruel_mode.description: A more cruel world, expanded story, more items, deadlier foes. Endure, or vanish.
cruel_mode.name: Cruel Mode

full_game.activationMessage: Full Game unlocked and activated! The journey continues without restrictions.
full_game.description: Unlock the full game and continue your journey.
